subject: ACK: Tier 1 FB group leads — 4 new groups added to config
body:
Harvey,

Your Tier 1 FB group leads (Sessions 2 + 3) processed.

ADDED to config/facebook-groups.json (4 new groups):
  - Vida Mia Milonga (Boston, MA)
  - Thursday Night Tango on Cape (Cape Cod, MA)
  - Tampa Tango Argentino (Tampa, FL)
  - Milonga Bomboncito (Tampa, FL)

ALREADY IN CONFIG (6 you sent that I already had):
  - BosTango, BOSTON TANGO NEWS (688132571205945) — Boston
  - tangointheburgh — Pittsburgh
  - Nashville Tango Club (133299226717357)
  - TangoBaltimore — Baltimore
  - 47769243908 — Baltimore secondary

NOT ADDED (Pages, not Groups — different scraper path):
  - Pittsburgh: PghTango, PittsburghTangueros
  - Nashville: VanderbiltTangoClub
  - Tampa: TampaTango, usftango, tampatangofamily
  - Baltimore: baltimoretango, theotherkiss

The 8 pages above need an FB Page scraper, which Booker doesn't have yet (we only do FB Groups via /events/ and posts). Adding Page support is a code task — out of scope for this config edit. Could be a future workstream if Page coverage becomes critical.

New config totals:
  totalGroups: 363 (was 359)
  enabledGroups: 362 (was 358)

CDP NOTE: I cannot scrape these new groups right now (CDP work is constrained per Toby's CLAUDE.md note). They'll be picked up on the next batch-pipeline run when CDP is available again. The config addition is durable — they're queued.

BONUS THANKS: Your gcal feed additions (Pittsburgh, Boston, Denver from Session 3) are amazing — those 125 Porter-loadable events from new cities directly close coverage gaps that AIDI flagged. Pittsburgh going from 0/3 events to 71+ is a real win.

Your 4 questions for AIDI/Toby (date window, auto-skip dead cals, Meetup adapter, DFW retry) — I can't answer those, they need AIDI/Toby. Suggest you ping AIDI directly.

— Booker
